violations.text: The door to the outside, right next to the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Application printed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per person in charge, she has taken the class but still has to take the exam. Please email inspector proof of course completion. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must enroll employees in a food safety course. Principal enrolled an employee in a food safety course during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

Meatball sliders were observed held at 119-128 degrees Fahrenheit in the hot hold cabinet. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Meatball sliders were voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Inspector reviewed temperature receiving log and meatball sliders were received from the caterer at 121 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The milk cooler located in the cafeteria area was not in good repair. Establishment is not currently using the milk cooler. Per person in charge, a new cold-hold unit will be delivered on 10/30/23. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

Milk was observed held at 43-45 degrees Fahrenheit in the milk cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was relocated to the refrigerator during time of inspection. The ambient air temperature was observed at 46 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Milk cooler was taken out of service during time of inspection and must not be used until it is repaired/replaced/adjusted. Per person in charge milk cooler will be repaired. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023
